name: farejador
description: Deterministic Chatwoot conversation capture into Supabase Postgres.

scripts.build:css: tailwindcss -c tailwind.painel.config.cjs -i styles/tailwind.css -o painel/public/tailwind.css --minify && tailwindcss -c tailwind.parceiro.config.cjs -i styles/tailwind.css -o parceiro/public/tailwind.css --minify
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
scripts.prova-painel: node scripts/prova-paridade-painel.cjs && node scripts/prova-paridade-matriz.cjs && node scripts/prova-endpoints-painel.cjs && node scripts/checar-tamanho.cjs && tsx scripts/prova-rotas-matriz.ts
